column1: If you______________(tell) me you were going to the beach, I'd have come with you.
If Dan had missed the plane, he_______________(be) very annoyed.
I'd have got you a present if I_____________(know) it was your birthday.
We______________(not/get) lost if we'd taken a map with us.
If the car_______________(not/break down), I wouldn't have been late.
If you ______________(not/help) me, I wouldn't have been late.
If Baz______________(not/show) you what to do, what______________(you/do)?
